reason: Successfully navigated to localhost agent, sent a message requesting browser navigation to example.com, waited for response, and verified the response mentions "Example Domain"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing Super Agent interface with list of agents in sidebar
Clicked on "QA-20260331-223200-dn47" agent in sidebar — Agent selected and chat interface opened with empty conversation
Clicked on message input textbox — Textbox focused and ready for input
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — Message text entered into textbox
Clicked "Send message" button — Message sent successfully, agent status changed to "working", new session "Browser Navigation and Page Title Check" created

Waited up to 3 minutes for response containing "Example Domain" — Response received within 26 seconds showing: "The page title is Example Domain. It's the standard IANA example domain page with a single "Learn more" link." Agent executed browser commands (Open Browser, Page Snapshot, Browser Command "get title", Close Browser) and returned to idle status
Took final screenshot — Screenshot captured showing complete conversation with agent response clearly mentioning "Example Domain"
